activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception not activated due to embedded LC number being part of an identifier but no explicit LC field
Consignor identification via explicit occurrence in invoice
Allowed abbreviation of legal business form in company name
General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization for country of origin

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB' from certificate matches exactly 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB' in invoice, including address and country Sweden, allowing abbreviation of legal form. Certificat's consignor also explicitly found in invoice header and VAT address block (rule 4.1.0).

consignee.invoice_value: SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'MINFENG SPECIAL PAPER CO.,LTD.' cannot be identified as the same party as invoice consignee 'SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED'. Invoice has a primary 'Buyer' field showing the latter, while 'MINFENG...' does not occur in invoice in any consignee or buyer role; no match after allowed normalizations.

goods_description.certificate_value: SODRA BLUE Z BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.invoice_value: COMMODITY: SODRA BLUE SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
goods_description.motivation: Certificate refers to general goods description with explicit invoice reference (Invoice No. 10998). Invoice describes commodity as 'SODRA BLUE SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' (without 'Z BLEACHED'). Variation requires manual review as minor differences in description within allowed tolerance but no exact text match.

quantity.motivation: Quantities and weights from certificate and invoice differ significantly. Certificate net weight 1508 ADMT vs invoice net weight 1014 ADMT is a clear mismatch beyond tolerance. Also number of bales and units differ markedly. No allowed summation or exception applies.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'SWEDEN' in certificate explicitly matches 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' in invoice (case-insensitive, normalized). EU normalization applies and China-Hong Kong equivalence is considered irrelevant here.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Critical mismatches in consignee and quantity prevent approval. Goods description requires manual review due to minor descriptive variations.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Mottagaren i certifikatet skiljer sig från den i fakturan, och kvantiteterna överensstämmer inte. Varubeskrivningen innehåller små skillnader som behöver manuell granskning. Certifikat och faktura kan därför inte godkännas automatiskt.
